title: Undopia 3D Trial Spawners
description: Gives the Trial Spawner and the Ominous Trial Spawner a 3 dimensional model
body:
![undopia-3d-trial-spawners](https://i.imgur.com/vKkeTVY.png) # Undopia 3D Trial Spawners [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-3d-trial-spawners?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-trial-spawners) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1184440?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-3d-trial-spawners) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Undopia 3D Trial Spawners gives the Trial Spawner and the Ominous Trial Spawner a 3 dimensional Model to enhance your Trial Experience! Get the best Trial Experience by combining it with [Undopia 3D Vaults](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-vaults) and to enhance your game even more get [Undopia 3D Spawner](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-3d-spawner), which fits perfectly with both Resource Packs! ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![pGe7NzP.png](https://i.imgur.com/pGe7NzP.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
--- [![Customizer](https://i.imgur.com/UEAZSvr.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/custom-downloads/) [![FAQ](https://i.imgur.com/GGUjVLj.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/faq) [![Terms & Conditions](https://i.imgur.com/kVzzs3F.png)](https://patch.undopia.net/terms-and-conditions) [![Bug Report / Feature Suggestion](https://i.imgur.com/mYSKqtv.png)](https://github.com/UnduGT/undopiapatch/issues)
